category_sources: Official Tox Wiki says toxcore handles end-to-end encrypted communication for the Tox protocol.
source_facts.description says toxcore is a C library implementing the Tox peer-to-peer network protocol.
display_name_sources: Official Tox Wiki page title is Toxcore.
docs_sources: Official Tox Wiki page documents toxcore and links to c-toxcore.
Official repository README is available as a documentation fallback.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already has https://github.com/TokTok/c-toxcore, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: Official Tox Wiki identifies end-to-end encrypted communication, protocol, and current c-toxcore implementation.
source_facts.description identifies a C library and peer-to-peer network protocol.
